title: Fibonacci Dizisi
subtitle: Iteratif ve recursive fibonacci hesaplama.
code:
def fibonacci_iterative(n)
  return n if n <= 1

  a, b = 0, 1
  (2..n).each do
    a, b = b, a + b
  end
  b
end

def fibonacci_recursive(n)
  return n if n <= 1
  fibonacci_recursive(n - 1) + fibonacci_recursive(n - 2)
end

puts "Iteratif Fibonacci (0-10):"
puts (0..10).map { |i| fibonacci_iterative(i) }.join(" ")

puts "\nRecursive Fibonacci (0-10):"
puts (0..10).map { |i| fibonacci_recursive(i) }.join(" ")

puts "\n20. Fibonacci sayisi: #{fibonacci_iterative(20)}"
